_comment: Sun Tzu, Today campaign import for YakYak — structure mirrors a real /workflow/export-campaign export. Config + 3-member cast roster ONLY (The Strategist who frames each maxim, The Student who lives it, The Rival who opposes him); no rendered assets (those generate per episode). Import: POST /workflow/import-campaign with body { userId, importData: <this file> }. Then copy the returned campaign id into marketing/SunTzuToday/show.env CAMPAIGN_ID. The style resolves by label ('Oil Painting'); no style.id is set because style uuids are per-environment. The cinematic chiaroscuro / ink-and-steel art direction is in movies[0].style — that text is appended to every image prompt. This is the FIRST 'Extracted' show: the story comes from a public-domain corpus (corpus/art_of_war.md, Lionel Giles 1910 translation, Project Gutenberg #132) walked one maxim per episode by compute.js (cursor = number of files in stories/). Distinct voices per character. animationType is 'kenburns' on purpose: reliable interim look while Kling AI (the doc's #3 target for duel motion) is in progress. The single movie is a season=null/episode=null TEMPLATE: copyCastFromSource clones this roster into each generated episode.
message: Hand-authored Sun Tzu, Today cast/config template (no rendered assets)

campaigns.name: Sun Tzu, Today — Ancient Strategy for Modern Life
campaigns.prompt: An episodic series: each episode takes one verbatim maxim from Sun Tzu's Art of War and stages it as a modern micro-drama — The Strategist frames the maxim, The Student faces a contemporary dilemma and applies it, The Rival opposes him. Seven scenes, ending on the maxim as a caption card.

style.label: Oil Painting
style.description: Cinematic chiaroscuro oil painting — dramatic light, deep shadow, painterly brushwork and classical gravitas.

movies.title: Sun Tzu, Today
movies.plot: Recurring cast template for Sun Tzu, Today. Holds The Strategist (mentor; opens + closes every episode), The Student (modern protagonist), and The Rival (recurring antagonist); each episode clones this roster.
movies.style: Cinematic chiaroscuro oil painting; ink-and-steel palette of deep blacks, cold steel greys and a single warm gold light source; dramatic Caravaggio side-lighting, visible painterly brushwork, a lone figure emerging from shadow, classical gravitas, film-still composition, faint calligraphic ink textures in the background.

customCast.name: The Strategist
customCast.description: The Strategist: a timeless master-strategist mentor in the spirit of Sun Tzu, an ageless robed sage with a calm unreadable face, close-cropped grey beard, steel-grey and bronze robes, holding a single bamboo strategy slip, lit by one warm gold light against deep shadow, cinematic chiaroscuro oil-painting style.

customCast.name: The Student
customCast.description: The Student: a modern young professional everyperson in a plain dark blazer, earnest and a little overwhelmed, expressive open face, carrying a worn notebook, caught between ambition and doubt, warm gold key light against steel-grey shadow, cinematic chiaroscuro oil-painting style.

customCast.name: The Rival
customCast.description: The Rival: a sharp, polished modern adversary — the toxic boss / ruthless competitor archetype — immaculate cold-grey suit, a thin confident smirk, hard backlit silhouette, crimson accent (tie or light), looming and composed, cinematic chiaroscuro oil-painting style.

cast.name: The Strategist
cast.description: The Strategist — timeless Sun Tzu-style mentor who frames each maxim; opens & closes every episode.

cast.name: The Student
cast.description: The Student — modern young professional who faces a dilemma and applies the maxim.

cast.name: The Rival
cast.description: The Rival — recurring modern adversary (toxic boss / ruthless competitor), crimson accent.
